FunTarget (Windows)

1) Run the .exe.

If the app says "Missing required configuration", it could not find:
  - SUPABASE_URL
  - SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
  - API_BASE_URL

The app loads these in this order:
  A) (release builds) embedded values (no setup required)
  B) Windows environment variables
  C) config.json next to the exe (copy config.json.example)
  D) (dev only) --dart-define at build/run time
